column1: # Tutorial Chapter 1, Lesson 4: numeric VALUE entry, range erase,
# vertical pointer-key commit, and the repeating-label prefix used
# Unsupported tutorial subflows intentionally not covered here:
# typed range addresses at POINT prompts, single-cell copy to a
# larger TO range, and named ranges as /Copy source arguments.
# Enter quarterly Net Sales values in B5..E5 using RIGHT as commit.
# Seed C8..D12 with temporary Costs and Expenses data.
# Erase C8..D12 by highlighting the range in POINT mode.
# Create the separator line in A4 with the repeating label prefix.
